channel.title: Blogs on Everywhere IT Solutions Ltd
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Everywhere IT Solutions Ltd

item.title: Building the Hugo MVP on Azure Static Web Apps
item.description: First steps in to the world of building a small company website the hardest part of the journey is always the first step Creating a website is one of those things that was on the to-do list for a long time, but never quite made it to the top. Work comes via networking, word of mouth and contacts built up over time, so while a modern company needs a public face, it has always been a job for mañana.
